article.headline: Leverkusen stretch winning run by beating Union 4-0 to reclaim top spot
article.description: Unbeaten Bayer Leverkusen thundered Union Berlin 4-0 on Sunday and move back to the top of the Bundesliga
article.linkText: Leverkusen thump Union, reclaim top spot

images.name: Leverkusen thrash Union to return to the top of the Bundesliga
images.caption: Bayer Leverkusen leapfrog Bayern Munich at the top of the Bundesliga after a dominant 4-0 win over Union Berlin.

video.headline: Leverkusen thrash Union to return to the top of the Bundesliga
video.caption: Bayer Leverkusen leapfrog Bayern Munich at the top of the Bundesliga after a dominant 4-0 win over Union Berlin.
video.title: Leverkusen thrash Union to return to the top of the Bundesliga
video.description: Bayer Leverkusen leapfrog Bayern Munich at the top of the Bundesliga after a dominant 4-0 win over Union Berlin.

tracking.trackingName: COM_SOC Highlight (Leverkusen thrash Union to return to the top of the Bundesliga) 2023/11/12 US ONLY

article.story:
Unbeaten Bayer Leverkusen thundered past embattled Union Berlin 4-0 on Sunday to extend their winning run to 12 matches across all competitions and move back to the top of the Bundesliga with a two-point advantage over Bayern Munich.

In-form Alejandro Grimaldo rifled in from outside the box in the 23rd minute to put the hosts in front, with Leverkusen missing several more chances in a strong first half.

- Stream on ESPN+: LaLiga, Bundesliga, more (U.S.)

Odilon Kossounou headed in another goal in the 57th minute before Jonathan Tah volleyed in at the far post in the 73rd to put the game to bed.

The hosts were not yet done and substitutes Amine Adli and Nathan Tella combined on a quick break with the latter drilling in from a tight angle in the 83rd.

Xabi Alonso's team, who have scored at least twice in each of their league matches so far this season, have now won their last seven Bundesliga games.

Leverkusen are leading the title race on 31 points, with Bayern Munich in second place on 29. VfB Stuttgart are third on 24.

Union's ninth straight league loss saw them drop to 18th place, level on six points with Cologne.

videos.headline: Alex Grimaldo scores stunner for Leverkusen vs. Union Berlin
videos.description: Alex Grimaldo puts Bayer Leverkusen 1-0 up against Union Berlin in the Bundesliga.

keyEvents.text: Goal!  Bayer 04 Leverkusen 1, 1. FC Union Berlin 0. Álex Grimaldo (Bayer 04 Leverkusen) left footed shot from outside the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Florian Wirtz.
Substitution, 1. FC Union Berlin. Robin Knoche replaces Leonardo Bonucci because of an injury.
Substitution, 1. FC Union Berlin. Christopher Trimmel replaces Josip Juranovic.
Second Half begins Bayer 04 Leverkusen 1, 1. FC Union Berlin 0.

Goal!  Bayer 04 Leverkusen 2, 1. FC Union Berlin 0. Odilon Kossounou (Bayer 04 Leverkusen) header from very close range to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Jonas Hofmann with a cross   following a corner.
Substitution, 1. FC Union Berlin. Brenden Aaronson replaces Sheraldo Becker.

Goal!  Bayer 04 Leverkusen 3, 1. FC Union Berlin 0. Jonathan Tah (Bayer 04 Leverkusen) right footed shot from the left side of the six yard box to the top right corner. Assisted by Álex Grimaldo with a cross   following a corner.
Frederik Rønnow (1. FC Union Berlin) is shown the yellow card.
